'''davodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nytril|nytril]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nytril|nytril]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| davodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dævedeth || dævedej || dævedesh || dævede
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || davovodoth || davovodoj || davovodosh || davovodo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || davodoth || davodoj || davodosh || davodo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || davofdofth || davofdofj || davofdofsh || davofdof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || davodotho || davodojo || davodosho || davodoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || davodoth || davodoj || davodosh || davodo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || davodothol || davodojol || davodoshol || davodokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || davodoothotho || davodoojojo || davodooshosho || davodooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || davodothon || davodojon || davodoshon || davodokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || davodothooro || davodojooro || davodoshooro || davodokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
